title: Anatomy of a C++ Template Class
description: A visual breakdown of a generic class template in C++, showing its declaration, instantiation, and the resulting specialized classes, including the role of the 'typename' and 'export' keywords.
relationships: The Template Class Declaration acts as a blueprint. The Client Code uses the template with specific types (e.g., int, string), which triggers the Compiler Instantiation Process to generate the concrete, Specialized Classes.
